observations.summary: The prepare-tests step opted out of E2E for a 'component-level change' but the e2e-tests step found the cross-page journey was genuinely uncovered and generated 3 E2E tests anyway.
observations.evidence: Journal step_end for e2e-tests: 'The original Story 2.6 ATDD checklist opted out of E2E (component-level change, would just test Next.js routing). I generated them anyway because the cross-page journey — Project Map card click landing on /artifacts with the right artifact pre-selected — was genuinely uncovered (Stories 2.4/2.5 navigate directly via URL or click within the Artifact Browser, never from the Project Map).'
